snippets.description: Delete deletes the backup taken by a backup run.
snippets.title: sqladmin Delete Sample

snippets.description: Get retrieves a resource containing information about a backup run.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description: Insert creates a new backup run on demand.
snippets.title: sqladmin Insert Sample

snippets.description:
List lists all backup runs associated with the project or a given instance
and configuration in the reverse chronological order of the backup
initiation time.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description:
CreateBackup creates a backup for a Cloud SQL instance. This API can be used only to
create on-demand backups.
snippets.title: sqladmin CreateBackup Sample

snippets.description: DeleteBackup deletes the backup.
snippets.title: sqladmin DeleteBackup Sample

snippets.description: GetBackup retrieves a resource containing information about a backup.
snippets.title: sqladmin GetBackup Sample

snippets.description: ListBackups lists all backups associated with the project.
snippets.title: sqladmin ListBackups Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateBackup updates the retention period and description of the backup. You can use
this API to update final backups only.
snippets.title: sqladmin UpdateBackup Sample

snippets.description:
GenerateEphemeralCert generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key
and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use
the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the
database.
snippets.title: sqladmin GenerateEphemeralCert Sample

snippets.description: GetConnectSettings retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin GetConnectSettings Sample

snippets.description:
ResolveConnectSettings retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance using the instance
DNS name.
snippets.title: sqladmin ResolveConnectSettings Sample

snippets.description: Delete deletes a database from a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Delete Sample

snippets.description:
Get retrieves a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud
SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description:
Insert inserts a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud
SQL instance.

**Note: ** You can't modify the default character set and collation.
snippets.title: sqladmin Insert Sample

snippets.description: List lists databases in the specified Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description:
Patch partially updates a resource containing information about a database inside
a Cloud SQL instance. This method supports patch semantics.
snippets.title: sqladmin Patch Sample

snippets.description:
Update updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud
SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Update Sample

snippets.description: List lists all available database flags for Cloud SQL instances.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description: AcquireSsrsLease acquire a lease for the setup of SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS).
snippets.title: sqladmin AcquireSsrsLease Sample

snippets.description:
AddEntraIdCertificate adds a new Entra ID certificate for the specified instance. If an Entra ID
certificate was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation,
this operation replaces that version.
snippets.title: sqladmin AddEntraIdCertificate Sample

snippets.description:
AddServerCa adds a new trusted Certificate Authority (CA) version for the specified
instance. Required to prepare for a certificate rotation. If a CA version
was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this
operation replaces that version. There cannot be more than one CA version
waiting to be rotated in. For instances that have enabled Certificate
Authority Service (CAS) based server CA, use AddServerCertificate to add a
new server certificate.
snippets.title: sqladmin AddServerCa Sample

snippets.description:
AddServerCertificate add a new trusted server certificate version for the specified instance
using Certificate Authority Service (CAS) server CA. Required to prepare
for a certificate rotation. If a server certificate version was previously
added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces
that version. There cannot be more than one certificate version waiting to
be rotated in. For instances not using CAS server CA, use AddServerCa
instead.
snippets.title: sqladmin AddServerCertificate Sample

snippets.description:
Clone creates a Cloud SQL instance as a clone of the source instance. Using this
operation might cause your instance to restart.
snippets.title: sqladmin Clone Sample

snippets.description:
CreateEphemeral generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key
and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use
the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the
database.
snippets.title: sqladmin CreateEphemeral Sample

snippets.description: Delete deletes a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Delete Sample

snippets.description:
Demote demotes an existing standalone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica
for an external database server.
snippets.title: sqladmin Demote Sample

snippets.description:
DemoteMaster demotes the stand-alone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica for an
external database server.
snippets.title: sqladmin DemoteMaster Sample

snippets.description: ExecuteSql execute SQL statements.
snippets.title: sqladmin ExecuteSql Sample

snippets.description:
Export exports data from a Cloud SQL instance to a Cloud Storage bucket as a SQL
dump or CSV file.
snippets.title: sqladmin Export Sample

snippets.description:
Failover initiates a manual failover of a high availability (HA) primary instance
to a standby instance, which becomes the primary instance. Users are
then rerouted to the new primary. For more information, see the
[Overview of high
availability](https: //cloud.google.com/sql/docs/mysql/high-availability)
page in the Cloud SQL documentation.
If using Legacy HA (MySQL only), this causes the instance to failover to
its failover replica instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Failover Sample

snippets.description: Get retrieves a resource containing information about a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description: GetDiskShrinkConfig get Disk Shrink Config for a given instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin GetDiskShrinkConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetLatestRecoveryTime get Latest Recovery Time for a given instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin GetLatestRecoveryTime Sample

snippets.description:
Import imports data into a Cloud SQL instance from a SQL dump  or CSV file in
Cloud Storage.
snippets.title: sqladmin Import Sample

snippets.description: Insert creates a new Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Insert Sample

snippets.description: List lists instances under a given project.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description:
ListEntraIdCertificates lists all versions of EntraID certificates for the specified instance.
There can be up to three sets of certificates listed: the certificate that
is currently in use, a future that has been added but not yet used to sign
a certificate, and a certificate that has been rotated out.
snippets.title: sqladmin ListEntraIdCertificates Sample

snippets.description:
ListServerCas lists all of the trusted Certificate Authorities (CAs) for the specified
instance. There can be up to three CAs listed: the CA that was used to sign
the certificate that is currently in use, a CA that has been added but not
yet used to sign a certificate, and a CA used to sign a certificate that
has previously rotated out.
snippets.title: sqladmin ListServerCas Sample

snippets.description:
ListServerCertificates lists all versions of server certificates and certificate authorities (CAs)
for the specified instance. There can be up to three sets of certs listed: 
the certificate that is currently in use, a future that has been added but
not yet used to sign a certificate, and a certificate that has been rotated
out. For instances not using Certificate Authority Service (CAS) server CA,
use ListServerCas instead.
snippets.title: sqladmin ListServerCertificates Sample

snippets.description:
Patch partially updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance by merging the request
with the current configuration. This method supports patch semantics.
snippets.title: sqladmin Patch Sample

snippets.description: PerformDiskShrink perform Disk Shrink on primary instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin PerformDiskShrink Sample

snippets.description:
PointInTimeRestore point in time restore for an instance managed by Google Cloud Backup and
Disaster Recovery.
snippets.title: sqladmin PointInTimeRestore Sample

snippets.description: PreCheckMajorVersionUpgrade execute MVU Pre-checks
snippets.title: sqladmin PreCheckMajorVersionUpgrade Sample

snippets.description:
PromoteReplica promotes the read replica instance to be an independent Cloud SQL
primary instance.
Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.
snippets.title: sqladmin PromoteReplica Sample

snippets.description: Reencrypt reencrypt CMEK instance with latest key version.
snippets.title: sqladmin Reencrypt Sample

snippets.description: ReleaseSsrsLease release a lease for the setup of SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS).
snippets.title: sqladmin ReleaseSsrsLease Sample

snippets.description: RescheduleMaintenance reschedules the maintenance on the given instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin RescheduleMaintenance Sample

snippets.description: ResetReplicaSize reset Replica Size to primary instance disk size.
snippets.title: sqladmin ResetReplicaSize Sample

snippets.description:
ResetSslConfig deletes all client certificates and generates a new server SSL certificate
for the instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin ResetSslConfig Sample

snippets.description: Restart restarts a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Restart Sample

snippets.description:
RestoreBackup restores a backup of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause
your instance to restart.
snippets.title: sqladmin RestoreBackup Sample

snippets.description:
RotateEntraIdCertificate rotates the server certificate version to one previously added with the
addEntraIdCertificate method.
snippets.title: sqladmin RotateEntraIdCertificate Sample

snippets.description:
RotateServerCa rotates the server certificate to one signed by the Certificate Authority
(CA) version previously added with the addServerCA method. For instances
that have enabled Certificate Authority Service (CAS) based server CA,
use RotateServerCertificate to rotate the server certificate.
snippets.title: sqladmin RotateServerCa Sample

snippets.description:
RotateServerCertificate rotates the server certificate version to one previously added with the
addServerCertificate method. For instances not using Certificate Authority
Service (CAS) server CA, use RotateServerCa instead.
snippets.title: sqladmin RotateServerCertificate Sample

snippets.description: StartExternalSync start External primary instance migration.
snippets.title: sqladmin StartExternalSync Sample

snippets.description: StartReplica starts the replication in the read replica instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin StartReplica Sample

snippets.description: StopReplica stops the replication in the read replica instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin StopReplica Sample

snippets.description:
Switchover switches over from the primary instance to the DR replica
instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Switchover Sample

snippets.description:
TruncateLog truncate MySQL general and slow query log tables
MySQL only.
snippets.title: sqladmin TruncateLog Sample

snippets.description:
Update updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause
your instance to restart.
snippets.title: sqladmin Update Sample

snippets.description: VerifyExternalSyncSettings verify External primary instance external sync settings.
snippets.title: sqladmin VerifyExternalSyncSettings Sample

snippets.description: Cancel cancels an instance operation that has been performed on an instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Cancel Sample

snippets.description: Get retrieves an instance operation that has been performed on an instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description:
List lists all instance operations that have been performed on the given Cloud
SQL instance in the reverse chronological order of the start time.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description:
Delete deletes the SSL certificate. For First Generation instances, the
certificate remains valid until the instance is restarted.
snippets.title: sqladmin Delete Sample

snippets.description:
Get retrieves a particular SSL certificate.  Does not include the private key
(required for usage).  The private key must be saved from the response to
initial creation.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description:
Insert creates an SSL certificate and returns it along with the private key and
server certificate authority.  The new certificate will not be usable until
the instance is restarted.
snippets.title: sqladmin Insert Sample

snippets.description: List lists all of the current SSL certificates for the instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description:
List lists all available machine types (tiers) for Cloud SQL, for example,
`db-custom-1-3840`. For more information, see
https: //cloud.google.com/sql/pricing.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description: Delete deletes a user from a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Delete Sample

snippets.description: Get retrieves a resource containing information about a user.
snippets.title: sqladmin Get Sample

snippets.description: Insert creates a new user in a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Insert Sample

snippets.description: List lists users in the specified Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin List Sample

snippets.description: Update updates an existing user in a Cloud SQL instance.
snippets.title: sqladmin Update Sample
